summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ideas View light theme implementation and overlay synchronization with chart pan/zoom functionality
passed_tests: Ideas View displays with light theme (rgb(248, 250, 252) background)
Idea Selector Strip has white background (rgb(255, 255, 255)) with proper border
Graph card has white background (rgb(255, 255, 255)) with proper styling
Bottom Insight Panel has white background with proper contrast
Overlay (triangle pattern) is visible on chart with 5 lines, 1 polygon, 6 circles, 9 texts
Overlay moves together with chart when dragging/panning - position synchronization verified
Overlay adjusts correctly with chart zoom operations
Price labels (R/S) display correctly on overlay
Version badge visible on chart showing 'V2 — Triangle 78%'
IDEA MODE badge visible on chart
Text colors have proper contrast on light background
Chart mode toggle functionality works correctly
Insight panel appears correctly after idea selection
